_comment: Global document processing rules applied to ALL fetched documents before chunking.
_comment2: Rules run in order. Per-source rules (in sources.json) run after these.
_comment3: apply_to: optional list of file extensions; omit to apply to all types.

rules.comment: Remove AsciiDoc single-line comments (// but not URLs like http://)
Collapse 3 or more consecutive blank lines into one
